Awards & Recognition

"The conference recognizes outstanding contributions in research and innovation. Awards will be presented to authors and presenters who demonstrate excellence, creativity, and impactful work in their respective fields. Celebrate your achievements and gain recognition among peers and experts.

Best Paper Award

​For the most outstanding research paper submitted and presented.

Best Presentation Award

For delivering an exceptional and engaging presentation.

Outstanding Innovation Award

For creative, innovative, and impactful contributions in the field.
